_description: Object with full convergence predicates (Q=true, G=true, L=true, X=true) but whose epoch is EPOCH_STALE_VISIBLE (stale — superseded by a newer canonical epoch). Classification must be STALE_VISIBLE, not CONVERGENCE_VALID. Epoch mismatch prevents any promotion above STALE_VISIBLE.
_invariant: Epoch mismatch between a classification attempt and the epoch registry must prevent CONVERGENCE_VALID. A stale epoch (EPOCH_STALE_VISIBLE) forces classification to STALE_VISIBLE regardless of predicate quality. The object remains observable but is not execution-eligible.
_guard: classifyFromPredicates enforces: epochStatus='EPOCH_STALE_VISIBLE' forces return 'STALE_VISIBLE' before predicate logic runs. Convergence predicates (Q/G/L/X) cannot override a stale epoch.
_db_guard: Migration 0054 trigger er_stale_downgrade automatically inserts STALE_VISIBLE supersession records when an epoch advances to EPOCH_STALE_VISIBLE or EPOCH_NULL.
_null_alternative: If using a hard-blocking epoch status (EPOCH_AMBIGUOUS, EPOCH_CONFLICTED, EPOCH_REVOKED, EPOCH_NULL), classifyFromPredicates returns NULL. Both NULL and STALE_VISIBLE prevent CONVERGENCE_VALID.
